text:
A railroad subject to this subtitle or Subtitle D is liable to a person, firm, or corporation injured for the damages resulting from:

(1) a prohibited or unlawful act or thing that the railroad does or causes or permits to be done; or

(2) failure of the railroad to perform an act the railroad is required to perform under this subtitle or Subtitle D.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 112. Powers & Duties of Railroads
##### § 112.003 — Damages

A railroad subject to this subtitle or Subtitle D is liable to a person, firm, or corporation injured for the damages resulting from:

    (1) a prohibited or unlawful act or thing that the railroad does or causes or permits to be done; or

    (2) failure of the railroad to perform an act the railroad is required to perform under this subtitle or Subtitle D.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.03, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: A railroad subject to this subtitle or Subtitle D is liable to a person, firm, or corporation injured for the damages resulting from:
a prohibited or unlawful act or thing that the railroad does or causes or permits to be done; or
failure of the railroad to perform an act the railroad is required to perform under this subtitle or Subtitle D.
